name: Creme Quiche Lorraine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon on High (100%) for 5 to 6 minutes or until crispy.
2. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
3. Mix together the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered 10-inch pie plate or quiche dish.
5. Sprinkle the crumbled bacon on top of the filling.
6. Cook on High for 10 to 12 minutes, until standing for 5 minutes or until completely set.
7. Yields 6 to 8 servings.
